summary.assessment: Hosted CRM surface is live, and password-reset mail is reaching the known mailbox, but no vault-backed scoped HubSpot bundle was detected yet. Account recovery path is real; the remaining blocker is converting that access into a bounded private-app token bundle without relying on stale or absent saved credentials. The rhumb browser profile also exposes no saved HubSpot login entry, so password-manager recovery is not a viable local shortcut.

Hosted CRM surface is live, and password-reset mail is reaching the known mailbox, but no vault-backed scoped HubSpot bundle was detected yet. Account recovery path is real; the remaining blocker is converting that access into a bounded private-app token bundle without relying on stale or absent saved credentials. The rhumb browser profile also exposes no saved HubSpot login entry, so password-manager recovery is not a viable local shortcut.
